zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Dixon於1496年8月26日出生在英國米德萊可倫敦時，她的父親Sir John Dixon36歲，母親Anne de Ros31歲。她於大約1513年與William Sandys在英國藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1546年3月11日在英國藍卡爾霍可黑阿德享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞霍可黑阿德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Dixon于1496年8月26日出生在英国米德萊可倫敦时，她的父亲Sir John Dixon36岁，母亲Anne de Ros31岁。她于大约1513年与William Sandys在英国藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1546年3月11日在英国藍卡爾霍可黑阿德享年49岁，埋葬在英国英格兰恩布利亞霍可黑阿德。

nameMeanings.name: Dixon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Dickson  , a patronymic from the personal name   Dick  .

variants.name: Dickson
meanings: Scottish and northern English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Dick + son.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Dixon was born on 26 August 1496, in London, Middlesex, England, her father, Sir John Dixon, was 36 and her mother, Anne de Ros, was 31. She married William Sandys about 1513, in Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 11 March 1546, in Hawkshead, Lancashire, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Hawkshead, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Dixon est née le 26 août 1496, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Dixon, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Anne de Ros, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé William Sandys environ 1513, à Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 11 mars 1546, à Hawkshead, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Hawkshead, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Lei sposato William Sandys circa 1513, nel Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Dixonが1496年8月26日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで生まれた時，父Sir John Dixonは36歳，母Anne de Rosは31歳であった。約1513年にイギリスランカシュアイアでWilliam Sandysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1546年3月11日にイギリスランカシュアイアハウクシェアドで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアハウクシェアドにて埋葬された。

ko.St Michael and All Angels' Church, Hawks: 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' 처르치
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Dixon(이)가 1496년 8월 26일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Dixon(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne de Ros(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1513년 영국 랭카실르에서 William Sandys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1546년 3월 11일 영국 랭카실르 호크셰아드에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 호크셰아드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William Sandys aproximadamente 1513, em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 1 filha. ru.St Michael and All Angels' Church, Hawks: ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Dixon родилась 26 августа 1496 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Dixon было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne de Ros, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sandys около 1513 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 11 марта 1546 г. в местности ховкшид, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности ховкшид, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.
